prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Blessed be the cooling-ducts, that they flow eternal!
CONGREGATION: Let not the heat-death claim our machine!
TECH-PRIEST: First, vent the excess thermae to the blessed radiators.
CONGREGATION: We hear and obey, Omnissiah!
TECH-PRIEST: Second, anoint the heat-pipes with sacred lubricant-oils.
CONGREGATION: By compression and flow, be cooled!

prompt: We need your words before lasgun power cell insertion
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Behold the blessed cell, vessel of photonic wrath!
CONGREGATION: May its charge be true and eternal!
TECH-PRIEST: Align the contact-nodes with reverent precision.
CONGREGATION: The machine receives its lifeblood!
TECH-PRIEST: Let no spark of heresy dim its radiance.
CONGREGATION: Amen to the Machine Spirit!

prompt: Say something to steady the vox transmission array
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Hear me, spirits of the ether-waves!
CONGREGATION: Carry our word across the void!
TECH-PRIEST: First, calibrate the frequency-crystals to sacred resonance.
CONGREGATION: Let no static corrupt our message!
TECH-PRIEST: Second, amplify the signal through the blessed amplifier-tubes.
CONGREGATION: From this world to the stars, we speak!

TECH-PRIEST: The broken metal cries out in supplication!
CONGREGATION: Mend it, that it be whole again!
TECH-PRIEST: Apply the fusion-rod to the fracture's wound.
CONGREGATION: Bind it with sacred flame!
TECH-PRIEST: Let the heat-pulse seal what was sundered.
CONGREGATION: The Omnissiah restores what was lost!

TECH-PRIEST: From the crucible comes rebirth most holy!
CONGREGATION: Bless the molten form!
TECH-PRIEST: First, purify the mold-cavity with blessed air-flow.
CONGREGATION: Let no impurity mar the sacred shape!
TECH-PRIEST: Second, pour the sacred metallurgic essence with reverent care.
CONGREGATION: From fire and metal, resurrection!

TECH-PRIEST: The lodestone-spirit falters! Restore its polarity!
CONGREGATION: Guide us back to true north!
TECH-PRIEST: Invoke the iron-rod's alignment with the stellar-south.
CONGREGATION: Let magnetism flow eternal!
TECH-PRIEST: The direction-machine awakens once more!
CONGREGATION: We shall not be lost in the void!

prompt: We need your words before bearing lubrication
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The sacred axles cry for anointing!
CONGREGATION: Grant them smooth rotation!
TECH-PRIEST: First, measure the sanctified lubricant with precision-measure.
CONGREGATION: Not too little, not too much!
TECH-PRIEST: Second, anoint each bearing-surface with reverent application.
CONGREGATION: Let friction be diminished, let motion be eternal!

TECH-PRIEST: The north-stone grows weak and confused!
CONGREGATION: Restore its sacred alignment!
TECH-PRIEST: Invoke the electromagnet's coil with blessed current.
CONGREGATION: Let the iron-spirits remember their duty!
TECH-PRIEST: The direction-oracle awakens!
CONGREGATION: Truth returns to our bearings!

TECH-PRIEST: Behold the fusion-catalyst, most volatile and holy!
CONGREGATION: May its fury be righteous!
TECH-PRIEST: First, verify the containment-vessel's integrity with blessed inspection.
CONGREGATION: Let no leakage spill its sacred wrath!
TECH-PRIEST: Second, seal the charge-chamber with the ritual-lock.
CONGREGATION: Ready now for the burning of foes!

prompt: My melta charge is failing, help
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The fusion-spirit weakens! Hear its plea!
CONGREGATION: Revive the sacred flame!
TECH-PRIEST: Test the pressure-gauge for the containment's seal.
CONGREGATION: Is it breached? Restore it!
TECH-PRIEST: Reinvigorate the catalytic-core with blessed current.
CONGREGATION: Burn eternal, weapon of the Omnissiah!
